goal: Implement authentication middleware, employee CRUD, deactivation with final settlement, and salary structure endpoints
summary: Phase 3 complete. Implemented backend core API: JWT auth controller and protected middleware, employee CRUD with search/pagination and auto Basic structure creation, soft-deactivation with final settlement, salary history, and salary structure CRUD with soft delete. All routes mounted in index.ts and TypeScript compiles cleanly.
stepSummaries:
1. Implement auth controller with JWT login and protected-route middleware [verified]
  2. Implement employee routes and controller with search, create, update, deactivate, and salary-history endpoints [verified]
  3. Implement salary structure routes and controller [verified]
reviewerRationale: All gates pass; project checks validate.

gateVerdicts.rationale: All three steps verified artifacts with grep/file checks and TypeScript compilation. Auth and employee endpoints were exercised only statically; runtime API tests will occur in integration phase.
gateVerdicts.evidence: Verified: auth route/middleware, employee routes with deactivate, salary structure routes; `npx tsc --noEmit` returned no errors for each step.

gateVerdicts.rationale: The phase goal was to implement authentication middleware, employee CRUD/deactivation, and salary structure endpoints. All deliverables are present and mounted in the Express app.
gateVerdicts.evidence: Files: authController.ts, auth.ts route, auth.ts middleware, employeeController.ts, employees.ts route, salaryStructureController.ts, salaryStructures.ts route, settlement.ts service, updated index.ts.

gateVerdicts.rationale: Nothing deferred. Settlement calculation currently uses the correct formula shape (daily rate /26, 15 days per year) and will be validated end-to-end during integration.
